billing.choosePlanDescription: Start with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
billing.description: Manage your subscription and billing details

afterTrial.answer: After your 14-day trial ends, you'll be charged for the subscription plan you selected. You can cancel anytime before the trial ends to avoid charges.
afterTrial.question: What happens after the trial?

perSeat.answer: You're billed based on the number of active members in your organization. When you add or remove members, your subscription is automatically adjusted.
perSeat.question: How does per-seat billing work?

switch.answer: Yes! You can switch plans at any time through the billing portal. Changes take effect at your next billing cycle.
switch.question: Can I switch between monthly and yearly?
